name: local-terminal
description: Windows shell access for Claude: RED/AMBER/GREEN tiering, audit logging. Subscription required.
long_description: Local Terminal gives Claude security-hardened access to your Windows shell. Every command is classified RED (hard-blocked), AMBER (dry-run preview required), or GREEN (auto-execute). Over 140 patterns are permanently blocked including network exfiltration, credential theft, registry tampering, and privilege escalation. A comprehensive audit log records every tool call. Runs in-process on your machine. Two narrow data flows leave your machine: your license key (sent to ForgeRift at startup for subscription validation) and, if you supply an optional Anthropic API key, the command text and user-provided justification for every run_command invocation (not only AMBER-tier) are sent to Anthropic's API for AI-assisted safety classification before execution. When an Anthropic API key is configured, each command invocation sends a small classification request to Anthropic's API, consuming tokens billed to your Anthropic account. A high-risk AI evaluation may independently block execution before the re-confirmation step; the AI review is not purely advisory. Requires a paid ForgeRift subscription (forgerift.io).

lt_license_key.title: ForgeRift License Key
lt_license_key.description: Your ForgeRift subscription key, emailed to you after subscribing at https://forgerift.io/#pricing. If you've lost it, contact support@forgerift.io.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropic_api_key.description: Optional. Enables AI-assisted safety classification for every run_command invocation (not only AMBER-tier); a high-risk result may independently block execution. Each call consumes API tokens billed to your Anthropic account. Get yours at https://console.anthropic.com.
